issues.impact: Server accepts unsigned tokens, allowing arbitrary claim forgery including role=admin.
issues.fix: Reject any token whose header alg is 'none'; pin verifier to the exact expected algorithm (e.g. RS256).

issues.impact: Stolen tokens never expire and can be replayed indefinitely after credential rotation.
issues.fix: Issue tokens with a short exp (<= 1h) and refuse tokens without exp on the verifier.

issues.impact: Bearer token leaks user PII to any service that logs Authorization headers or proxies the request.
issues.fix: Move email to a server-lookup keyed by sub; keep tokens minimal.

summary: Token is unsigned (alg=none) and lacks exp; treat as a critical auth bypass.
